Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Escalon Company]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Jak is the acting president of the Escalon Company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 25''' — The Escalon Company is a mid-level corporation founded by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The narrator has looked into the Escalon Company.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — The Escalon Company is a group that Starhammer might target.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Aila Escalon once shackled Omega to the Escalon Company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 17''' — Omal hired violent criminals from the Escalon Company.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — The Escalon Company was founded by Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — The Escalon Company functions as a private detective agency that finds missing people and makes found people go missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — The President of the Escalon Company is present on the planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Escalon Company owned a tattoo parlor.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
